page_content:
BUSM622 Managing Digital Business Markets (2 Credits)

The objective is to understand the strategic and tactical issues

involved in managing digital businesses and markets. Also, some of the characteristics of digital businesses and markets that make them unique and understand how companies can best manage them will be examined. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUSI622 or BUSM622.
